assertions.description: The adapter advertises the core-features-and-limits feature.
A requested device exposes a GPUSupportedFeatures set including core-features-and-limits.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const ok=d.features&&typeof d.features.has==='function'&&d.features.has('core-features-and-limits');d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: Device limits include maxTextureDimension2D, one of the canonical core limits.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const ok=typeof d.limits.maxTextureDimension2D==='number'&&d.limits.maxTextureDimension2D>0;d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: Adapter limits expose maxBindGroups, another core limit available before device creation.
